title: Chicken Crunchy Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe using chicken, crunchy ingredients, and noodles. Serve immediately for a delicious meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
Add the crunchy peanut butter to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the noodles to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the chopped scallions, chopped fresh cilantro, soy sauce, honey, and red pepper flakes to the skillet. Stir to combine.
Return the cooked chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the noodles are cooked through.
